name.description: A name for the image.  Defaults to the filename if not provided.  If the name matches an existing image, a suffix will be added.

import_from_url.description: An existing image url to import the image from. Alternatively, you may specify a base-64 encoded data-uri (`data:image/...`). Supported image formats: jpeg,png,gif. Maximum image size: 5MB.

hidden.description: If true, this image is not shown in the asset library.
